name_cn:
Size 11*8*4cm
This hard-to-get hot item PHONE BOX phone bag (M44914) was taken off the website as soon as it was released. To buy it, you must book it at the counter first. Our overseas channel stock is in. This L*V PHONE BOX bag has a delicate, retro, exquisite appearance, presenting the phone bag in a new BOX look, giving a full sense of freshness, a youthful look, and can be carried on the shoulder, making it completely fine to use as a general small bag for going out! It is enough to hold a large-screen phone body, so it became a hot model as soon as it was released! The upright design makes the compact body hold more than a general small bag!
